memories.response_summary: Healthcare Cognitive Assistant: Smart Hospital ICU monitoring, patient flow, emergency care, compliance, streaming telemetry, and replay. Compose the workflow in Orchestration Studio, compile it into a governed runtime graph, then execute with replay and confidence tracking enabled.

recommendations: Build the first version in Orchestration Studio and compile before execution.
Add governance and replay nodes early so the workflow remains auditable.
For healthcare, treat CINTENT as economy-wide cognitive infrastructure across providers, devices, pharma, insurance, research, telemedicine, logistics, governance, replay, and enterprise operations.

memories.response_summary: Drone Mission Intelligence Assistant: CHAXU drone, autonomous systems, edge, swarm simulation, mission replay, governance, and operational telemetry workflows. Use Multi-Agent Runtime when the workflow needs delegation, consensus, or distributed reasoning.

recommendations: Use agent coordination when delegation, consensus, edge recovery, or swarm synchronization is required.
Review delegation replay before converting the workflow into an enterprise package.
For UAV work, treat CINTENT as the cognitive infrastructure layer above MAVLink, PX4, ArduPilot, DJI, UTM, and DGCA-ready governance.

memories.response_summary: Travel Intelligence Assistant: BlissTrail travel orchestration, airport integration, itinerary planning, localization APIs, and travel simulations. Compose the workflow in Orchestration Studio, compile it into a governed runtime graph, then execute with replay and confidence tracking enabled.

recommendations: Build the first version in Orchestration Studio and compile before execution.
Add governance and replay nodes early so the workflow remains auditable.

memories.response_summary: Manufacturing Systems Assistant: Smart manufacturing orchestration, quality governance, equipment telemetry, and digital twins. Start with Distributed Robotics Coordination API, Robotics Cognitive Runtime API, Robotic Task Orchestration API and validate the short list in sandbox before production entitlement.

recommendations: Review Distributed Robotics Coordination API first, then compare adjacent APIs before adding to cart.
Use Ask COGNI follow-up questions to move from discovery into execution planning.
